raw_articles.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
raw_articles.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.

raw_articles.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
raw_articles.summary: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.

raw_articles.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
raw_articles.summary: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.

raw_articles.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
raw_articles.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

raw_articles.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
raw_articles.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

raw_articles.title: Capital One releases VulnHunter, an open-source AI tool that finds software flaws before hackers do
raw_articles.summary: Capital One on Thursday released VulnHunter, an open-source, agentic AI security tool that scans source code for exploitable vulnerabilities, maps out how an attacker would reach them, and proposes targeted fixes — all before a single line ships to production. The tool, built internally and now available on GitHub under an Apache 2.0 license, is one of the most ambitious attempts by a major financial institution to turn offensive AI capabilities into a public defensive resource.At a time when se

raw_articles.title: Intuit scrapped its own AI agent architecture twice in four months. At VB Transform 2026, its AI VP called that the fast path
raw_articles.summary: Intuit was an early pioneer in the usage of agentic AI, but its path to success has hardly been a straight line.At VB Transform 2026, Intuit VP of AI Nhung Ho described how the company rebuilt its agent architecture twice in the span of about four months, first moving from a fleet of specialist agents to a central orchestration layer, then abandoning that layer for a skills and tools based system once the orchestrator itself started failing under its own complexity. raw_articles.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
raw_articles.summary: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

raw_articles.title: Nvidia Broadens Physical AI Push With Robotics, Edge AI Updates
raw_articles.summary: The chipmaker is fleshing out its physical AI ecosystem, from foundation models and edge hardware to software, developer tools and industrial partnerships.

raw_articles.title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
raw_articles.summary: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.

raw_articles.title: Anthropic in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power
raw_articles.summary: The talks come weeks after Anthropic announced a similar deal with Elon Musk's SpaceX to use the computing capacity at its Colossus 1 data center

raw_articles.title: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
raw_articles.summary: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool is initially being tested with "some" US creators, TikTok US spokesperson Zachary Kizer tells The Verge. YouTube has been working on a similar tool […]

raw_articles.title: What Cities From Chicago to Washington, DC, Look Like Under a Blanket of Wildfire Smoke
raw_articles.summary: The US is home to some of the most polluted air on the planet as smoke from 120 out-of-control Canadian wildfires drifts across the border.

raw_articles.title: Agents think in milliseconds, legacy infrastructure doesn't. LinkedIn, Walmart and Zendesk shared how they closed the gap at VB Transform 2026
raw_articles.summary: Legacy infrastructure, not the models themselves, is what's actually slowing AI agents down. raw_articles.title: Polymarket’s Corporate Structure Is a Mystery—Even to Some of Its Former Employees
raw_articles.summary: The prediction market’s Panamanian operation seems odd, even for a company whose CEO had his apartment raided by FBI agents.
